title: Adjust governance complexity budget for release truth Work Item
rawUserRequest: 继续执行已授权的串行整改计划；如当前工单触发治理复杂度预算不足，创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR，完成完整闭环后回到当前工单，不能跳过工单流程。
outOfScope: 工单 1 的实现、测试和计划文档
任何生产行为或发布流程变更

sources.reason: 当前已确认的治理复杂度预算和 repaymentRecords。
复杂度预算必须显式确认并记录偿还。
完整质量门报告 pythonLines=35784 exceeds maximum 35743。

riskAssessment.reason: 仅调整已授权的 Python 行数预算并增加 repayment 记录，不改变生产行为、工单 1 内容或测试语义。

executionDecision.reason: 用户已授权在预算不足时创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR。

preReviewWarnings: Verify the increase is limited to the measured 35784 Python-line total and carries a repayment record.
Verify no plan content or Work Item 1 implementation is included.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The confirmed pythonLines maximum admits the measured release-truth Work Item without hiding an unrelated complexity increase.
The policy change includes an explicit repayment record naming the final cleanup responsibility.
All declared AI and project checks pass, and the PR diff contains no Work Item 1 implementation or plan-content change.

declaredIntent.summary: Calibrate the confirmed governance Python-line budget for the current release-truth Work Item only.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Measured Python lines exceed the confirmed maximum by 41 lines
Budget increase has repayment evidence and no Work Item 1 content

guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: 工单 1 的完整质量门测得 Python 行数 35784，超过当前确认上限 35743，导致质量门 fail closed。
constraints: 只修改治理复杂度预算和 repaymentRecords。
不修改工单 1 实现、测试或计划文档，不开始后续工单。
预算必须按实际测量值校准，不得用无证据的宽泛上限掩盖复杂度。
intent.rationale: 独立预算 Work Item 保持工单边界清晰，并让当前工单在预算得到明确授权和偿还记录后继续。

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: 用户已授权创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR，并要求继续执行但不跳过完整生命周期。

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
